sources.title: Jean-Claude Van Damme 1998 - Knock Off - There is no substitute.
sources.description:
They flooded the market with fakes… but he’s the real deal in explosive justice.


Original Title: Knock Off (1998) | AKA: Operation Knock Off

⭐️ STARRING
Jean-Claude Van Damme (Marcus Ray)
Rob Schneider (Tommy Hendricks)
Lela Rochon (Karen Lee)
Paul Sorvino (Harry Johansson)
Carman Lee (Detective Ling Ho)
Wyman Wong (Eddie Wang)
Glen Chin (Skinny)
Michael Fitzgerald Wong (Han)

🎬 CREW CREDITS
Directed by Tsui Hark (Double Team, Time and Tide)
Written by Steven E. de Souza (Die Hard, Commando)
Action Choreography by Hung Yan-yan (Blade, The Matrix Reloaded)

🎯 WHY WATCH?
• JCVD MEETS TSUI HARK: JCVDs splits collide with the Hard Boiled director’s chaotic energy!
• 90s TECHNO-THRILL RIDE: Exploding denim, and a villainous Rob Schneider.
• HONG KONG ON MAX: Sampan chases, fish-market shootouts, and a climax inside a typhoon!
• CULT TIME CAPSULE: Pre-Y2K paranoia meets delirious late-90s adrenaline stunts.

🌎 MULTI-LINGUAL ⚙️
SUBTITLES: Multiple languages available! Click [CC] and select your language.
AUDIO: Original English, French, Hindi, Polish, Portuguese, Spanish dubbed tracks.

🔔 SUBSCRIBE @CultCinemaClassics

• Action • Thriller • Crime • Martial Arts • Sci-Fi

metadata.Plot: A Hong Kong fashion designer (Jean Claude Van Damme, if you can believe that billing) who had previously been involved in knock offs of major label merchandise, such as "Pumma" running shoes, attempts to go straight with the help of his new partner (Rob Schneider), who is secretly an undercover CIA agent involved in an investigation of the black market. Their main product, jeans, is involved in the knock offs, which brings a representative (Lela Rochon) of the American company to investigate. Paul Sorvino also appears as the head of the CIA operation in Hong Kong. However, just as Schneider is not as he initially seems, everyone in the film switches roles by film's end.
metadata.Actors: Jean-Claude Van Damme, Rob Schneider, Lela Rochon
